page_title: Neon Genesis Evangelion: Girlfriend of Steel Special Edition Visual Fan Book
text:
is a guidebook for Neon Genesis Evangelion: Iron Maiden Special Edition video game by Kadokawa Game Collection. It was published by Kadokawa Shoten on 25 April 2006 for ￥2,100 (tax included). https://www.amazon.co.jp/dp/4047072176 

Overview

Includes many illustrations drawn by famous illustrators, phone cards, posters, and more. A story summary that tells the story together with CG and a large amount of original setting drawings centered on event CG! Interviews with eight voice actors looking back on the 10th anniversary, An interview with director Ritsuro Hashimoto is also posted.
